hull_assembly.description: The structural backbone of the rocket. SR quality determines re-entry heat tolerance and structural integrity.

engine_assembly.description: Thrust power and fuel efficiency. Requires Crystal Lattices (Aethite-derived). MA quality sets fuel efficiency multiplier.

fuel_tank.description: Holds propellant. PE quality increases effective fuel capacity.

avionics_core.description: Navigation precision and sensor range. CD quality sets landing accuracy. Fallback recipe available without Void Cores.

landing_gear.description: Shock absorption for landing. High-SR gear survives rough terrain with no damage.
